## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Webflow's developer content strategy and information architecture, focusing on organic content creation and site structure improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement to focus on creating organic content for a developer blog/learn section while site structure is being finalized](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Need to restructure developer documentation for better user experience and information hierarchy](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Plan to set up a separate Webflow workspace for GrowthX to stage content before importing to Webflow's blog](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Information Architecture

  - [Proposed structure: Documentation, Learn (blog), Resources, and Support as top-level categories](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Separation of API reference from guides within documentation](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Need for clear distinction between guides (Webflow-specific) and organic content (general developer topics)](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Glossary suggested as an index page for Webflow terms and structures](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Content Creation and Publishing Process

  - [GrowthX to start writing content, focusing on non-cannibalizing topics](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Content to be temporarily published on main Webflow blog until developer site structure is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Vivian to help determine which topics are suitable for blog vs. dev blog](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Webflow workspace for content staging](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [Ongoing discussion about the structure and placement of integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Potential for creating a standalone subfolder or marketing value page for integrations](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Need to improve discoverability and value proposition of integrations](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Site Restructuring Challenges

  - [Current developer site hosted on Fern, built off a managed Git repository](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Need to align on a forward strategy to avoid constant reiteration](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [Colin working on finalizing information architecture in the next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Restructuring documentation unlikely to significantly impact SEO due to Webflow's authority on the subject](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
  - [Organic content restructuring could potentially hurt SEO, but currently not an issue due to lack of existing content](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to clean and send over content topics for review](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Vivian to connect GrowthX with Web team for Webflow project access](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Colin to finalize information architecture plan in the next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
  - [GrowthX to send list of prompts for tracking to Vivian for approval](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
  - [Explore possibility of GrowthX supporting site restructuring with their developer and designer resources](https://fathom.video/share/iy1B4C5a2ChR1z-7z3ApUzcbhja-kx_A?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)
